title: Quota Preflight Request
description: Request body for POST /api/v1/billing/preflight. Asks whether a cost-generating action would be admitted for the caller's tenant, without performing it. The client supplies the dimensions it intends to consume (the same numbers the eventual create will use, e.g. optimization_samples = max_rounds * items_per_round for a hybrid run); the preflight does not infer run configuration. Omitted dimensions default to 1 unit.

action.description: The action the client intends to perform.

requested.description: Requested units per quota dimension. Keys are resource_type values (e.g. optimization_trials, optimization_samples). Omitted dimensions default to 1 unit. Preflight is advisory; the create call re-checks admission authoritatively.
